acceptanceCriteria: package.json includes @supabase/supabase-js as dependency
bun install completes without errors
Supabase client can be imported in web app

task-auth-002.description: Create IAuthService interface and auth types
acceptanceCriteria: types.ts exports IAuthService interface
Interface defines signUp(email, password) returning Promise<AuthResult>
Interface defines signIn(email, password) returning Promise<AuthResult>
Interface defines signOut() returning Promise<void>
Interface defines getSession() returning Promise<AuthSession | null>
Interface defines onAuthStateChange(callback) returning Unsubscribe function
AuthUser, AuthSession, AuthResult, AuthError types exported
No runtime dependencies - types only
store.ts exports createAuthStore factory function
AuthStore has user (AuthUser | null), session (AuthSession | null), status, error properties
AuthStore has setUser, setSession, setStatus, setError actions
AuthStore has initialize action that fetches current session from provider
AuthStore has signUp, signIn, signOut actions delegating to environment.authService
AuthStore has isAuthenticated, isLoading computed views
Store accesses authService via getEnv()
IEnvironment interface includes optional authService: IAuthService property
Existing environment implementations continue to work (backward compatible)
authService can be accessed via getEnv(self).authService
supabase.ts exports SupabaseAuthProvider class implementing IAuthService
Constructor accepts Supabase client instance or URL+key config
signUp creates user with email/password via supabase.auth.signUp
signIn authenticates with email/password via supabase.auth.signInWithPassword
signOut calls supabase.auth.signOut
getSession returns current session via supabase.auth.getSession
onAuthStateChange wraps supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange
Errors are mapped to AuthError type with code and message
mock.ts exports MockAuthProvider class implementing IAuthService
Constructor accepts optional initial users Map<email, password>
signUp adds user to internal map, returns mock AuthResult
signIn validates credentials against internal map
signOut clears current session
getSession returns mock session if authenticated
onAuthStateChange stores callback and returns unsubscribe function
Triggers auth state callbacks when sign in/out occurs
No external dependencies - fully in-memory

task-auth-007.description: Create React AuthContext and useAuth hook
acceptanceCriteria: AuthContext.tsx exports AuthProvider component
AuthProvider accepts authStore prop (MST store instance)
AuthProvider initializes store on mount via store.initialize()
AuthProvider sets up onAuthStateChange subscription with cleanup in useEffect
useAuth hook returns { user, session, status, error, isAuthenticated, isLoading, signUp, signIn, signOut }
useAuth throws if used outside AuthProvider
Components using useAuth re-render on auth state changes (observer pattern)
ProtectedRoute.tsx exports ProtectedRoute component
Accepts children and optional redirectTo prop (default: '/login')
Renders children if isAuthenticated is true
Redirects to redirectTo path if unauthenticated
Shows loading state while status is 'loading'
Uses useAuth hook internally
